text: iPhone 15 Pro features the A17 Pro chip, titanium design, and a 48MP camera system with a 6.1-inch Super Retina XDR display. Available in 256GB, 512GB, and 1TB storage options. Price starts at ₹134,900. Supports USB-C, Action Button, and always-on display.

Samsung Galaxy S24 comes with Galaxy AI features, a Dynamic AMOLED 2X display at 6.2 inches, Exynos 2400 processor, 128GB storage, 50MP triple camera, and 4000mAh battery. Priced at ₹79,999. Includes Circle to Search, Live Translate, and AI-powered photo editing.

Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones offer industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer, 30-hour battery life, 30mm drivers, multipoint connection, and weigh just 250g. Priced at ₹29,990. Features Speak-to-Chat and Quick Attention mode.

MacBook Air M3 features the Apple M3 chip, 15.3-inch Liquid Retina display, 8GB unified memory, 256GB SSD, and up to 18 hours of battery life. Priced at ₹114,900. Supports up to two external displays, has MagSafe charging, and fanless design.

Google Pixel 9 Pro features the Tensor G4 chip, advanced AI capabilities, 6.3-inch Super Actua display, 50MP triple camera system, and 4700mAh battery. Priced at ₹109,999. Includes Gemini Nano on-device AI, Magic Eraser, and 7 years of OS updates.

AirPods Pro 2 with H2 chip offer Adaptive Transparency, Personalized Spatial Audio, up to 6 hours of listening with ANC (30 hours with case), USB-C charging, and IP54 water resistance. Priced at ₹24,990.

iPad Air powered by M1 chip features a 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, 12MP camera, Touch ID, USB-C, and supports Apple Pencil 2nd generation and Magic Keyboard. Available in 64GB and 256GB. Currently out of stock.

ElectroMart's smartphone collection includes flagship devices from Apple (iPhone 15 Pro), Samsung (Galaxy S24), Google (Pixel 9 Pro), and Nothing (Phone 2a). All smartphones come with a 1-year manufacturer warranty and optional ElectroMart Extended Care plan.

ElectroMart's audio category includes premium headphones (Sony WH-1000XM5), true wireless earbuds (AirPods Pro 2), and portable speakers. All audio products include a 1-year warranty and 7-day no-questions-asked return policy.

ElectroMart shipping: Standard delivery takes 5-7 business days (free for orders above ₹999). Express delivery takes 2-3 business days (₹149 for orders below ₹4,999, free above). Same-day delivery is available in select metros for ₹299. All orders are insured during transit.

ElectroMart warranty coverage: All products include the manufacturer's standard warranty (typically 1 year). ElectroMart Extended Care adds 1 additional year of coverage including accidental damage for smartphones and laptops. Extended Care costs 8% of the product price and must be purchased within 15 days of the original order.

ElectroMart payment options: Credit/Debit cards, UPI, Net Banking, EMI (no-cost EMI available on select products for 3/6/9/12 months), Buy Now Pay Later (via Simpl, ZestMoney), and Cash on Delivery (up to ₹50,000). All payments are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.
